system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Grapple against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

Your hair flows wildly as it bristles with Qi energy and your strands fly out in all directions gripping and dissecting your foes. Make a Grapple roll against everyone in a 30-foot area per Rank of Neigong. Your hair grows, flies and grabs anyone with zero Qi Ranks in this area whose Evade score your Grapple roll meets or exceeds. On a Success they are killed in one of two gruesome ways: the hair rips their bodies in two or they are choked. Either way the death is instant. This does not work against anyone Qi Rank 1 or greater. You can opt to restrain targets rather than kill them. Requirement: Unless the GM states otherwise you must have the White Hair Flaw to use this. Cathartic: On a Cathartic use this can be used against anyone with Qi Rank 1 or more, however it only does 2d10 Damage. In lieu of doing Damage you can opt to restrain targets for one round instead.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: Unless the GM states otherwise you must have the White Hair Flaw to use this.
